feed.title: GTFS Scorecard: feed quality changes
feed.subtitle: Transit agencies whose GTFS data quality grade or score moved since their last check.

entry.title: Flex: grade dropped D to F
entry.summary: On 2026-07-03, Flex's GTFS data quality went from 60.4 (D) to 60.0 (F). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Spirit Bus: score rose 2.3 points
entry.summary: On 2026-07-03, Spirit Bus's GTFS data quality went from 64.4 (D) to 66.7 (D). A step in the right direction.

entry.title: Bus: grade improved F to D
entry.summary: On 2026-07-03, Bus's GTFS data quality went from 56.6 (F) to 63.2 (D). A step in the right direction.

entry.title: Rail: score rose 4.3 points
entry.summary: On 2026-07-03, Rail's GTFS data quality went from 71.7 (C) to 76.0 (C). A step in the right direction.

entry.title: Sonoma County Transit (SCT): grade dropped C to D
entry.summary: On 2026-07-03, Sonoma County Transit (SCT)'s GTFS data quality went from 70.3 (C) to 69.8 (D). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Sonoma County Transit (SCT): grade dropped C to D
entry.summary: On 2026-07-03, Sonoma County Transit (SCT)'s GTFS data quality went from 70.3 (C) to 69.8 (D). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Static feed for realtime: score rose 1.0 points
entry.summary: On 2026-07-03, Static feed for realtime's GTFS data quality went from 62.9 (D) to 63.9 (D). A step in the right direction.

entry.title: San Francisco Bay Area Water Emergency Transportation Authority (WETA): grade dropped A to B
entry.summary: On 2026-07-03, San Francisco Bay Area Water Emergency Transportation Authority (WETA)'s GTFS data quality went from 90.3 (A) to 88.6 (B). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: NY Waterway: grade dropped B to C
entry.summary: On 2026-07-03, NY Waterway's GTFS data quality went from 80.2 (B) to 78.8 (C). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Local Bus: grade dropped C to D
entry.summary: On 2026-07-03, Local Bus's GTFS data quality went from 70.0 (C) to 69.6 (D). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Franklin County Public Transportation: grade dropped D to F
entry.summary: On 2026-07-03, Franklin County Public Transportation's GTFS data quality went from 60.0 (D) to 59.6 (F). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Static feed for realtime: grade dropped D to F
entry.summary: On 2026-07-03, Static feed for realtime's GTFS data quality went from 67.5 (D) to 59.2 (F). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Catholic Community Services: grade dropped D to F
entry.summary: On 2026-07-03, Catholic Community Services's GTFS data quality went from 60.4 (D) to 60.0 (F). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Catholic Community Services: grade dropped D to F
entry.summary: On 2026-07-03, Catholic Community Services's GTFS data quality went from 60.4 (D) to 60.0 (F). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Catholic Community Services: grade dropped D to F
entry.summary: On 2026-07-03, Catholic Community Services's GTFS data quality went from 60.4 (D) to 60.0 (F). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Broward County Transit: grade improved B to A
entry.summary: On 2026-07-03, Broward County Transit's GTFS data quality went from 86.9 (B) to 90.4 (A). A step in the right direction.

entry.title: Boxcar Commuter Bus: grade improved C to B
entry.summary: On 2026-07-03, Boxcar Commuter Bus's GTFS data quality went from 71.7 (C) to 81.1 (B). A step in the right direction.

entry.title: Blacksburg Transit: grade dropped D to F
entry.summary: On 2026-07-03, Blacksburg Transit's GTFS data quality went from 60.3 (D) to 59.9 (F). Trip planners read the same feed, so a drop is worth a look.

entry.title: Bay Area Transportation Authority: score rose 1.8 points
entry.summary: On 2026-07-03, Bay Area Transportation Authority's GTFS data quality went from 55.0 (F) to 56.8 (F). A step in the right direction.
